description: DayPage v4 Liquid Glass — visual system migration (Source Serif 4 + Source Han Serif cascading fonts, glass surface recipe, Day Orb hero, Glass TabBar, v4 Daily Page) + raw memo tappable into MemoDetailView + experience polish (motion tokens, empty states, glass error banner, CJK punctuation polish, haptics, first-run welcome). Source: tasks/prd-daypage-v4-liquid-glass.md · Linked GitHub Issues: EPIC #245 / #243 #244 #246 #247 #248

userStories.title: Add DesignSystem/Motion.swift with timing tokens
userStories.description: As a developer, I need 4 unified animation tokens so animations across the app share one motion language.
acceptanceCriteria: Create DayPage/DesignSystem/Motion.swift
Define Motion.fade = .easeOut(duration: 0.18)
Define Motion.rise = .timingCurve(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1, duration: 0.24)
Define Motion.slide = .timingCurve(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1, duration: 0.28)
Define Motion.spring = .spring(response: 0.35, dampingFraction: 0.8)
Each token has a brief // doc comment describing when to use it
Typecheck passes

Define Haptics.warn() -> UINotificationFeedbackGenerator().notificationOccurred(.warning)
Define Haptics.success() -> UINotificationFeedbackGenerator().notificationOccurred(.success)

Function is pure (no side effects, no IO)
